channel.title: DFINITY Foundation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by DFINITY Foundation (dfinity).

item.title: CVE-2024-11991 · 5.6 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Uninitialized memory access in Motoko incremental garbage collector
item.description: Motoko's incremental garbage collector is impacted by an uninitialized memory access bug, caused by incorrect use of write barriers in a few locations. This vulnerability could potentially allow unauthorized read or write access to a Canister's memor…

item.title: CVE-2024-7884 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory leak when calling a canister method via `ic_cdk::call`
item.description: When a canister method is called via ic_cdk::call* , a new Future CallFuture is created and can be awaited by the caller to get the execution result. Internally, the state of the Future is tracked and stored in a struct called CallFutureState. A bug…

item.title: CVE-2024-4435 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — BTreeMap memory leak when deallocating nodes with overflows
item.description: When storing unbounded types in a BTreeMap, a node is represented as a linked list of "memory chunks". It was discovered recently that when we deallocate a node, in some cases only the first memory chunk is deallocated, and the rest of the memory chu…

item.title: CVE-2024-1631 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — agent-js: Insecure Key Generation in `Ed25519KeyIdentity.generate`
item.description: Impact: The library offers a function to generate an ed25519 key pair via Ed25519KeyIdentity.generate with an optional param to provide a 32 byte seed value, which will then be used as the secret key. When no seed value is provided, it is expected th…

item.title: CVE-2023-6245 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Infinite decoding loop through specially crafted payload
item.description: The Candid library causes a Denial of Service while parsing a specially crafted payload with 'empty' data type. For example, if the payload is `record { * ; empty }` and the canister interface expects `record { * }` then the Rust candid decoder treat…
